title: Text gif. In simple handwritten font is the message “I love you.” Below, flashes the words, “Today, Tomorrow, Always, Forever.”
Digital illustration gif. White cat leans in to kiss a happy gray cat wiggling its ears who jumps back in surprise at the kiss. A few red hearts flap like they have wings as they kissed.
Illustrated gif. Mauve-colored striped cat sits on a patch of grass, but on its butt like a human, blowing kisses that become hot pink hearts and float away.
Kawaii gif. A white and a gray cat look at each other and the white cat gives the grey cat a kiss on the cheek. A red heart floats up between them.
